mapper.sql: task_id as "taskId", owner_user_id as "ownerUserId", session_id as "sessionId", workspace_id as "workspaceId", client_request_id as "clientRequestId", session_title as "sessionTitle", content_preview as "contentPreview", run_input_json as "runInputJson", status, slot_start as "slotStart", slot_end as "slotEnd", window_end as "windowEnd", target_linux_server_id as "targetLinuxServerId", scheduled_task_run_id as "scheduledTaskRunId", run_id as "runId", rollover_count as "rolloverCount", task_created_session as "taskCreatedSession", dispatch_started_at as "dispatchStartedAt", dispatch_attempt_id as "dispatchAttemptId", dispatch_owner_backend_process_id as "dispatchOwnerBackendProcessId", dispatch_lease_until as "dispatchLeaseUntil", state_version as "stateVersion", dismissed_at as "dismissedAt", reservation_released_at as "reservationReleasedAt", error_code as "errorCode", error_message as "errorMessage", trace_id as "traceId", created_at as "createdAt", updated_at as "updatedAt"

owner_user_id=#{ownerUserId}, session_id=#{sessionId}, workspace_id=#{workspaceId}, client_request_id=#{clientRequestId}, session_title=#{sessionTitle}, content_preview=#{contentPreview}, run_input_json=#{runInputJson}, status=#{status}, slot_start=#{slotStart}, slot_end=#{slotEnd}, window_end=#{windowEnd}, target_linux_server_id=#{targetLinuxServerId}, scheduled_task_run_id=#{scheduledTaskRunId}, run_id=#{runId}, rollover_count=#{rolloverCount}, task_created_session=#{taskCreatedSession}, dispatch_started_at=#{dispatchStartedAt}, dispatch_attempt_id=#{dispatchAttemptId}, dispatch_owner_backend_process_id=#{dispatchOwnerBackendProcessId}, dispatch_lease_until=#{dispatchLeaseUntil}, state_version=#{stateVersion}, dismissed_at=#{dismissedAt}, reservation_released_at=#{reservationReleasedAt}, error_code=#{errorCode}, error_message=#{errorMessage}, trace_id=#{traceId}, created_at=#{createdAt}, updated_at=#{updatedAt}
mapper.update: update night_execution_tasks set where task_id=#{taskId} and status=#{expectedStatus} and state_version=#{expectedStateVersion}
mapper.insert: insert into night_execution_tasks( task_id, owner_user_id, session_id, workspace_id, client_request_id, session_title, content_preview, run_input_json, status, slot_start, slot_end, window_end, target_linux_server_id, scheduled_task_run_id, run_id, rollover_count, task_created_session, dispatch_started_at, dispatch_attempt_id, dispatch_owner_backend_process_id, dispatch_lease_until, state_version, dismissed_at, reservation_released_at, error_code, error_message, trace_id, created_at, updated_at) values(#{taskId},#{ownerUserId},#{sessionId},#{workspaceId},#{clientRequestId},#{sessionTitle}, #{contentPreview},#{runInputJson},#{status},#{slotStart},#{slotEnd},#{windowEnd}, #{targetLinuxServerId},#{scheduledTaskRunId},#{runId},#{rolloverCount},#{taskCreatedSession}, #{dispatchStartedAt},#{dispatchAttemptId},#{dispatchOwnerBackendProcessId},#{dispatchLeaseUntil}, #{stateVersion},#{dismissedAt},#{reservationReleasedAt},#{errorCode},#{errorMessage}, #{traceId},#{createdAt},#{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select from night_execution_tasks where owner_user_id=#{ownerUserId} and client_request_id=#{clientRequestId}
select from night_execution_tasks where session_id=#{sessionId} and status in ('SCHEDULED','DISPATCHING') order by created_at desc limit 1
select from night_execution_tasks where owner_user_id=#{ownerUserId} and session_id=#{sessionId} and status='FAILED' and dismissed_at is null order by updated_at desc limit 1
select count(*) from night_execution_tasks where owner_user_id=#{ownerUserId} and status in ('SCHEDULED','DISPATCHING')
select slot_start as "slotStart", reserved_count as "reservedCount" from night_execution_slot_reservations where slot_start >= #{windowStart} and slot_start < #{windowEnd} order by slot_start
mapper.insert: insert into night_execution_slot_reservations(slot_start,reserved_count,updated_at) values(#{slotStart},0,#{now}) on conflict (slot_start) do nothing
insert into night_execution_session_locks(session_id,task_id,owner_user_id,created_at) values(#{sessionId},#{taskId},#{ownerUserId},#{now}) on conflict do nothing
mapper.delete: delete from night_execution_session_locks where session_id=#{sessionId} and task_id=#{taskId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from night_execution_session_locks where session_id=#{sessionId}
